title: Data Engineer with Tableau & Databricks
description:
Key Responsibilities

Database Migration Support

•                  Support end-to-end database migration activities, including data validation, transformation, and reconciliation.

•                  Assist in migrating data sources that underpin large-scale visualization dashboards.

•                  Identify and resolve data integrity, performance, and compatibility issues arising from migration.

Data Engineering & Platform Management

•                  Develop and maintain SQL and Python-based data pipelines using Databricks and Jupyter Notebooks.

•                  Create and manage Databricks compute clusters and SQL Warehouses; and configure Unity Catalog for data governance and access control.

•                  Optimize queries and data models to ensure performance and scalability post-migration.

BI & Dashboard Enablement

•                  Reconfigure, test, and validate Tableau dashboards impacted by database changes.

•                  Partner with dashboard owners to ensure data accuracy, performance, and functional parity after migration.

•                  Support ad-hoc analysis and troubleshooting related to Tableau and SpotFire dashboards.

Collaboration & Documentation

•                  Work closely with Data Analysts, Business Stakeholders, and IT teams within ASM.

•                  Document migration steps, data mappings, and known issues to support knowledge transfer and audit readiness.

•                  Follow ASM data governance, security, and compliance standards.

•                  Collaborate with global network/database team to identify, engineer and key data elements in-line with existing needs.

Required Skills & Qualifications

Technical Skills (Mandatory)

•                  Tableau certification (required; active or recently obtained).

•                  Strong proficiency in SQL / MySQL for querying, transformation, and validation.

•                  Hands-on experience with Python for data processing and automation.

Experience using Databricks, including: Creating and managing compute clusters and SQL Warehouses.

Working with Unity Catalog

•                  Experience working with Jupyter Notebooks.

Technical Skills (Nice-to-Have / Highly Favored)

•                  Experience with SpotFire (dashboard development or support).

•                  Prior involvement in database or platform migration projects.

•                  Familiarity with manufacturing, biotech, or regulated environments.

postedCompany.description: Enfactum is a boutique consulting company which specializes in business analytics and e-marketing solutions and services for the technology industry. We have multi-national clients as our customers.
postedCompany.name: ENFACTUM PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
